_scenario: Below-the-floor comps query: an obscure / out-of-domain item with no good comparable sales. comps_search returns nothing above min_similarity (low_confidence=true); analyze escalates rather than fabricate. SC2 / Q-REFUSE: the answer must surface as 'no good comps', never a number.

structured_query.filter_notes: no lots matched the requested scope

analyze._answer_note: answer is omitted entirely when escalating — the contract types answer as string and it is not in `required`; analyze emits no priced answer below the floor.
